CREATE TABLE random_test (id UInt64, random_value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO random_test SELECT number, rand64() FROM numbers(100);
SELECT id, random_value FROM random_test WHERE random_value > rand64();
SELECT rand64() AS random_num, count() FROM random_test GROUP BY random_num;
SELECT id, rand64() AS random_value FROM random_test ORDER BY random_value LIMIT 10;
WITH (SELECT rand64() FROM random_test WHERE id < 50) AS rnd_values SELECT count(*) FROM random_test WHERE random_value IN rnd_values;
CREATE TABLE table_a (a UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE table_b (b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY b;
INSERT INTO table_a SELECT number FROM numbers(50);
INSERT INTO table_b SELECT rand64() FROM numbers(50);
SELECT a.a, b.b FROM table_a AS a JOIN table_b AS b ON a.a = b.b WHERE a.a < rand64();
CREATE TABLE complex_test (x UInt64, y UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY x;
INSERT INTO complex_test SELECT number, rand64() FROM numbers(100);
SELECT x, y FROM complex_test WHERE y > (SELECT max(rand64()) FROM complex_test) AND x < 50;
SELECT count(*) FROM complex_test WHERE rand64() > 10000000000 AND x % 2 = 0;
